title: Pre-sales: SOC 2 documentation request
body: Requesting SOC 2 Type II report and most recent penetration test results for security review. We are a fintech and cannot proceed without confirming compliance posture.

title: Pre-sales: Node.js migration documentation
body: Our DevOps team (James Liu) is looking for any documentation on Node.js + PostgreSQL migrations from legacy toolchains. We want to scope the implementation effort before signing.

title: Contract: milestone payment schedule confirmation
body: Confirming that payment schedule is milestone-based as discussed: 50% at kickoff, 50% on API GA confirmation. We need this reflected in the contract document before signing.
